About BeforeDepart

Know everything before you depart.

BeforeDepart helps you know everything about where you are going — before you leave home. Safety, transport, hotels, food, local customs, emergency numbers, attractions, insurance, eSIMs and the essentials, all in one place, for any destination on Earth.

We started BeforeDepart in Virginia with a simple goal: travelers should arrive prepared, not spend hours with twenty browser tabs open. Whether you are flying across the world or driving to a campground a few hours away, BeforeDepart gets you ready before you depart.

Affiliate disclosure

BeforeDepart may earn a commission when you book through some of the links on our site — hotels, tours, travel insurance, eSIMs, campsites and car rentals. This never costs you anything extra, and it helps keep BeforeDepart free to use.

Terms of Service

Last updated: June 2026

Welcome to BeforeDepart. These Terms govern your use of www.beforedepart.com and the BeforeDepart service, operated by BeforeDepart LLC ("BeforeDepart", "we", "us"). By using the site, you agree to these Terms.

1. What BeforeDepart is

BeforeDepart is a destination intelligence service. We help you learn about places before you travel - safety, transport, stays, food, local customs, emergency numbers, attractions, camping and cruises. We provide information and links to third-party partners. We are not a travel agency and we do not sell, book, or provide travel, lodging, camping, cruise, or transport services ourselves.

2. Information is for guidance only

We work to keep our information useful, but prices, hours, availability, rules, and other details change often and can be wrong or out of date. Everything on BeforeDepart - including cost estimates and campground or cruise details - is a guide only. Always confirm important details (prices, bookings, entry rules, safety, emergency numbers) with the official source before you rely on them or travel.

3. Affiliate links

Some links on BeforeDepart are affiliate links. If you click them and make a purchase or booking on a partner site, we may earn a commission at no extra cost to you. This helps keep BeforeDepart free. Your purchase, booking, and any related contract is between you and that partner.

4. Third-party sites and partners

When you leave BeforeDepart for a partner site (such as a hotel, tour, insurance, eSIM, car rental, campsite, or cruise provider), that site's own terms and privacy policy apply. We are not responsible for the products, services, content, prices, or actions of third parties.

5. Your account

Some features let you create an account to save trips and notes. You are responsible for keeping your password safe and for activity under your account. Tell us right away if you think your account has been used without permission. You must give accurate information and be old enough to form a binding contract where you live.

6. Acceptable use

You agree not to misuse the service - for example, by trying to break, overload, copy, scrape, or interfere with the site, using it for unlawful purposes, or infringing the rights of others.

7. Our content

The BeforeDepart name, logo, design, and original content are owned by BeforeDepart LLC and may not be copied or used without our permission. Third-party names and logos belong to their owners.

8. No warranties

BeforeDepart is provided "as is" and "as available", without warranties of any kind, to the fullest extent allowed by law. We do not promise the service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or that the information is complete or accurate.

9. Limitation of liability

To the fullest extent allowed by law, BeforeDepart LLC is not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential losses, or for any loss arising from your reliance on information, your use of partner sites, or your travel decisions. Where liability cannot be excluded, it is limited to the amount you paid us (if any) in the past 12 months.

10. Changes

We may update the service or these Terms from time to time. Continued use after changes means you accept the updated Terms.

11. Governing law

These Terms are governed by the laws of the Commonwealth of Virginia, USA, without regard to conflict-of-law rules.

12. Contact

BeforeDepart LLC, 14203 Glade Spring Dr, Centreville, VA 20121. Email: info@beforedepart.com.

Privacy Policy

Last updated: June 2026

This Privacy Policy explains how BeforeDepart LLC ("BeforeDepart", "we", "us") handles information when you use www.beforedepart.com.

1. Information we collect

Account information: if you create an account, we collect your email address and a display name, and store a securely hashed version of your password - we never see your raw password.
Trips you save: destinations, dates, traveler counts, notes, and any booking links you add.
Approximate location: to show camping near you, we may detect your approximate location from your internet (IP) address, or your precise location if you tap "Use my location" and allow it in your browser. You can decline.
Usage information: basic technical data such as device and browser type and pages viewed, to keep the site working and improve it.

2. How we use information

We use your information to provide and improve the service, save your trips, send account emails (such as sign-up verification and password resets), keep the site secure, and respond to your messages.

3. How information is shared

We do not sell your personal information. We share it only with service providers who help us run BeforeDepart, and only as needed: hosting, database and accounts (Supabase and our website host) and email delivery (Resend, for verification and password-reset emails). When you click an affiliate or partner link and leave our site, the partner handles your information under their own privacy policy, which we do not control.

4. Cookies and local storage

We use a small amount of browser storage and cookies to keep you signed in and remember basic preferences. You can clear these in your browser settings.

5. Keeping your information

We keep your account information while your account is active. You can ask us to delete your account and data at any time by emailing info@beforedepart.com.

6. Your choices and rights

You can view or update your profile, delete saved trips, decline location sharing, and request deletion of your account. Depending on where you live, you may have additional rights over your data; contact us to use them.

7. Security

We use reasonable measures to protect your information, including encrypted connections and hashed passwords. No method is perfectly secure, but we work to keep your data safe.

8. Children

BeforeDepart is intended for adults and is not directed to children under 13 (or the minimum age in your country). We do not knowingly collect data from children. If you believe a child has given us data, contact us and we will remove it.

9. Changes

We may update this policy from time to time. The "last updated" date shows the latest version.

10. Contact

BeforeDepart LLC, 14203 Glade Spring Dr, Centreville, VA 20121. Email: info@beforedepart.com.
